question: What hiring signals appear in AI Agent roles?

records.observation: The role emphasizes infrastructure for training and production deployment of AI agents, including orchestration, APIs, and large-scale systems.

records.source_title: Applied AI Engineer, Codex Core Agent
records.observation: The role asks for improving agent performance on real software engineering tasks, evals, tool-use strategies, and production reliability.
The role highlights orchestration, sandboxing, secure connectivity, observability, reliability, and cost controls for long-running cloud agents.
The role centers on building AI agents for internal and external use cases, pairing fullstack product work with applied AI systems.

records.source_title: Software Engineer, Agentic AI Systems, Cloud Security
records.observation: The role calls for GenAI or ML platform experience, agentic AI systems, and development of next-generation security agentic features.

records.source_title: Senior Software Engineer, Agentic AI Systems, Cloud Security
records.observation: The role emphasizes research, design, development, and operational excellence for agentic platforms and autonomous security operations.
